content:
A gratuitously long video going over every single part of Xu's kit, builds, as well as every single teamcomp I've personally played (or have watched in depth) and think is good either in D-Tide, hard story or both. Sorry it's so late into her banner! Thanks if you watch or listen! **Also by popular-ish request the video now starts with an 8 minute long briefer summary version of the lecture**
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9C3XdSEb-Vs
